plugins.name: engineering-board
plugins.description: Autonomous engineering board: multi-agent build system over docs/boards/ markdown. Passive finding-extractor captures per-turn scratch; PM pipeline (consolidator + tidier + learnings-curator) promotes verified findings to the live board; Worker pipeline (tdd-builder + code-reviewer + validator) drives a tdd->review->validate needs: state machine with atomic claim locking. v0.2.2 adds /pm-start, /worker-start, claim infrastructure, /board-install-permissions.
